title: tunica prolifera var. pubescens
intro: Tunica prolifera var. pubescens, also known as the mangrove fern, is a species of fern that is native to tropical coastal regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The mangrove fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
